description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a sloped plot with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The front facade features a prominent balcony running the length of the upper floor, supported by columns and bordered by a sleek railing. Large windows on the ground floor provide ample natural light and a visual connection to the exterior, while the upper floor has a more reserved window arrangement. The house is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkway, with a combination of grass and retaining walls defining the landscape. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the sloped terrain.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front balcony, and expansive windows, set on a sloped lot with a paved driveway and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-width balcony, large ground-floor windows, and the main entrance area with a paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slope of the terrain, the driveway curving around the house, and a more private facade with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal window openings and the extent of the sloped landscape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance or service area, small windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and minimal side/rear openings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and a paved approach integrated into the front facade
